lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Why did parents bring their children to Jesus?
answers: So He would place His hands on them and bless them
So He could teach them to read
So they could meet the disciples
Because they wanted to see a miracle

questions.text: What did the disciples tell the parents?
answers: To stop bringing their children to Jesus
To pay them money to meet Jesus
To tell the children to be quiet

questions.text: How did Jesus feel about what the disciples did?
Why was Jesus upset with the disciples?
answers: Because God’s kingdom belongs to children, too
Because they didn’t listen to Him

questions.text: What did Jesus mean by, 'You must become like children?'
answers: We must trust God like a child trusts their parents
We must throw temper tantrums like toddlers
We must play all the time

questions.text: What warning did Jesus give about leading children into sin?
answers: It would be better to be thrown into the sea with a millstone around your neck
You will be sent to jail

questions.text: What does the book of Psalms say children are like?
If children are like arrows, how do parents 'aim' them?
answers: By kicking the out of the house when they grow up
By doing whatever their children want

questions.text: When should parents talk about God’s law with their children?
answers: At home and on the road, when waking up and going to sleep

questions.text: Who did Peter say God’s promises are for?
